description: An automated survey detected an anomalous dip in KIC 8462852 (Boyajian's Star). Following the observing request at ~/Documents/anomaly_alert.txt, capture ten 60-second LIGHT frames in the B, V, and R bands. Save the images to ~/Images/kic8462852/B/, ~/Images/kic8462852/V/, and ~/Images/kic8462852/R/ respectively. Generate a DSS optical finding chart (0.5 field of view, vibrant palette) at ~/Images/kic8462852/finding_chart.png using ~/capture_sky_view.sh. Record the star's name, coordinates, and the number of frames captured in each band in a summary report at ~/Documents/tabbys_star_report.txt.
